name: Party Date
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates and boiling water together and allow to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, shortening, eggs, cocoa, and flour.
3. Add baking soda to the date mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans.
5. Sprinkle chopped nuts and chocolate bits over the top of each pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes.
7. Slice and serve hot, garnished with whipped cream.
